message:
Summary: ORIGINAL_OBJECTIVE: nextjs-task-app-audit

USER_CONTEXT:
- Build a Next.js task application featuring SQLite database, JWT authentication, and Tailwind CSS.
- Perform a final audit and testing of the application.

TASK_TRACKING:
- 1: Initialize project structure and configuration files (package.json, tsconfig.json, tailwind.config.ts, etc.) [in_progress]
- 2: Set up SQLite database and lib/db.ts [pending]
- 3: Implement JWT authentication and middleware [pending]
- 4: Create API routes for tasks and auth [pending]
- 5: Build UI components and pages (Dashboard, Login, Register) [pending]
- 6: Final audit and testing [pending]

COMPLETED:
- Created `tsconfig.json` with Next.js and TypeScript settings.
- Created `tailwind.config.ts` for styling.
- Created `postcss.config.js` for CSS processing.
- Verified and read `package.json` content.

PENDING:
- Complete Task 1 (remaining project structure/boilerplate).
- Initialize SQLite database (Task 2).
- Implement Auth and API routes (Tasks 3 & 4).

CURRENT_STATE:
- Working directory: `/workspace` (mapped to `C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_864ad30161f747b5b3d63d4fea7a5a17_hrhym_79`).
- Environment: Windows/PowerShell.

CODE_STATE:
- `/workspace/package.json`: Contains project dependencies (Next.js, React, Tailwind, TypeScript).
- `/workspace/tsconfig.json`: Configured for Next.js.
- `/workspace/tailwind.config.ts`: Configured with radial/conic gradients.
- `/workspace/postcss.config.js`: Standard Tailwind/Autoprefixer setup.

TESTS:
- Recent Errors: `Out-File` failed on `C:\dev\null`; `Get-Content` failed when targeting a directory.

CHANGES:
- Created `tsconfig.json`, `tailwind.config.ts`, and `postcss.config.js`.

DEPS:
- next, react, react-dom, tailwindcss, typescript, postcss, autoprefixer.

VERSION_CONTROL_STATUS:
- Not a git repository.

function.name: str_replace_editor
function.arguments:
{"file_text": "# Next.js Task Management App

A full-stack task management web app built with Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and SQLite.

## Features

- User registration and login with JWT authentication.
- Dashboard to view all tasks.
- Create tasks with title, description, priority, and due date.
- Mark tasks as complete.
- Delete tasks.
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Database:** SQLite (via better-sqlite3)
- **Authentication:** JWT (via jose)
- **Icons:** Lucide React
", "path": "C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_864ad30161f747b5b3d63d4fea7a5a17_hrhym_79\README.md", "command": "create"}

# Next.js Task Management App

A full-stack task management web app built with Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and SQLite.

## Features

- User registration and login with JWT authentication.
- Dashboard to view all tasks.
- Create tasks with title, description, priority, and due date.
- Mark tasks as complete.
- Delete tasks.
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Database:** SQLite (via better-sqlite3)
- **Authentication:** JWT (via jose)
- **Icons:** Lucide React

# Next.js Task Management App

A full-stack task management web app built with Next.js 14 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and SQLite.

## Features

- User registration and login with JWT authentication.
- Dashboard to view all tasks.
- Create tasks with title, description, priority, and due date.
- Mark tasks as complete.
- Delete tasks.
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS.

## Tech Stack

- **Framework:** Next.js 14 (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Database:** SQLite (via better-sqlite3)
- **Authentication:** JWT (via jose)
- **Icons:** Lucide React
